title: cornopteris decurrenti-alata f. musashiensis
intro: Cornopteris decurrenti-alata f. musashiensis, also known as the Japanese polypody, is a species of fern native to Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cornopteris decurrenti-alata f. musashiensis are said to include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as having antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Cornopteris decurrenti-alata f. musashiensis is often used in teas, infusions, and salves, and is also used in traditional Japanese medicine, known as Kampo.
